meanings.definition: United States comedian and film actor (1896-1996)
celebrated Scottish poet (1759-1796)
pain that feels hot as if it were on fire
a browning of the skin resulting from exposure to the rays of the sun
an injury caused by exposure to heat or chemicals or radiation
a place or area that has been burned (especially on a person's body)
damage inflicted by fire
destroy by fire
examples: They burned the house and his diaries

meanings.definition: shine intensely, as if with heat
examples: The coals were glowing in the dark

meanings.definition: undergo combustion
cause a sharp or stinging pain or discomfort
cause to burn or combust
examples: The sun burned off the fog
We combust coal and other fossil fuels

meanings.definition: feel strong emotion, especially anger or passion
examples: He was burning to try out his new skies

meanings.definition: cause to undergo combustion
examples: The car burns only Diesel oil

meanings.definition: burn at the stake
spend (significant amounts of money)
feel hot or painful
burn, sear, or freeze (tissue) using a hot iron or electric current or a caustic agent
get a sunburn by overexposure to the sun
create by duplicating data
use up (energy)
examples: burn off calories through vigorous exercise

meanings.definition: burn with heat, fire, or radiation
examples: The iron burnt a hole in my dress
